---
hub_index: false
title: "Full conventions (canonical source)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

This topic now lives only in the canonical ontology repo.

- Full conventions: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md>
- Formal ontology docs: <https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon>
- Term requests: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/SUBMIT_REQUESTS_README.md>
